title: How to Access the Project Initiation Document (PID) Template
summary: Learn how members of the Digital Project Manager community can download the ready‑made PID template, which includes pre‑filled sections such as context, WBS, RACI, risks and sign‑off.
content: A comprehensive PID template is available to members of the Digital Project Manager community. Users can become members to download the template, which includes pre‑filled sections for context, parameters, specifics, WBS, RACI, risks, and sign‑off fields.
can_answer: How can I download a PID template?
Is a PID template available for members?
Where is the PID template located?
warnings: Templates may need customization to fit specific project methodologies.
limitations: Template access requires a paid membership.
